query_title: Le vie del Signore sono finite

recommendations.title: I'm Starting from Three
recommendations.overview: Gaetano, a young Neapolitan, decides to leave home, work and friends, to look for other moments of life and meet other people.

recommendations.title: I Thought It Was Love
recommendations.overview: Tommaso goes incredible lengths to win back the love of his former girlfriend Cecilia, but sometimes things change in the most unexpected way.

recommendations.title: Sorry for the Delay
recommendations.overview: Vincenzo, a 30 years old apathetic and lazy man who still lives with his mother, has no job and no desire to improve. He meets Anna and fell in love with her but to keep the relationship alive he has to learn to accept more responsibility.

recommendations.title: Nothing Left to Do But Cry
recommendations.overview: Two 20th-century friends accidentally stumble into the year 1492, where they meet a charming teen and try to alter history.

recommendations.title: What Time Is It?
recommendations.overview: A father and his son who lived seperated for some time meet each other one day and try to talk their problems over and understand their diametrical differences.

recommendations.title: The Great Dictator
recommendations.overview: Dictator Adenoid Hynkel tries to expand his empire while a poor Jewish barber tries to avoid persecution from Hynkel's regime.

recommendations.title: Rear Window
recommendations.overview: A wheelchair-bound photographer spies on his neighbors from his apartment window and becomes convinced one of them has committed murder.

recommendations.title: The Man Who Wasn't There
recommendations.overview: A tale of murder, crime and punishment set in the summer of 1949. Ed Crane, a barber in a small California town, is dissatisfied with his life, but his wife Doris' infidelity and a mysterious opportunity presents him with a chance to change it.

recommendations.title: Nappily Ever After
recommendations.overview: After an accident at the hair salon, Violet realizes she's not living life to the fullest. A soulful barber helps her put the pieces back together.

recommendations.title: Sweeney Todd: The Demon Barber of Fleet Street
recommendations.overview: The infamous story of Benjamin Barker, a.k.a Sweeney Todd, who sets up a barber shop down in London which is the basis for a sinister partnership with his fellow tenant, Mrs. Lovett. Based on the hit Broadway musical.
